name: BLOOMIN' BRANDS  DL-,01
summary: Bloomin' Brands, Inc. owns and operates casual dining restaurants. Its portfolio includes Outback Steakhouse, Carrabba's Italian Grill, Bonefish Grill, and Fleming's Prime Steakhouse & Wine Bar, offering a variety of steak, seafood, pasta, and other dishes. The company is headquartered in Tampa, Florida.
